title: Gear Fourth Presses Doflamingo
description: Boundman dominates the battlefield, but Doflamingo’s endurance keeps Dressrosa in danger.
scene: On pages 5–9, Luffy, Doflamingo, King Riku, Zoro, Dressrosa Citizens move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Run! Make for the Central Districts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The line of death draws ever nearer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The cage is just dragging them along with it! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The country itself is shrink- ing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Plateau on which the Royal Palace is located

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Bird Cage is growing smaller!? So that's the real- son for all this ruckus!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is the true horror of bird cage, dear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is bad! Get the collapsed guys up on their feet! We ain't gonna just sit here and wait for death to come!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If their fight goes on much longer, this plateau is going to be ripped to shreds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is the center of the country! Shouldn't it be safe?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Look closely! The center of the cage is slowly shifting!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The epicenter of this shrinking is most likely...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The plateau where the Palace now stands! Where Doflamingo is NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: They really surprised me... those dwarves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I really hope it attached properly. Your arm.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: If blood starts flowing through it,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: While I was underground in that trading port, I realized something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: This fight... assuming you two manage to defeat Dofla- Mingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: The ripples from that splash will be felt the world over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You all will become the eye of the storm.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Put on a little weight there, haven't you?

summary: This part focuses on gear fourth presses doflamingo, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
